body: Any tips for navigating Japanese trains? The system seems overwhelming with so many lines.
Google Maps works amazingly well for Japanese transit. It shows exact platform numbers and transfer times.
Get a Suica or Pasmo IC card. Tap on and off, works on almost all trains and buses. Can even use it at convenience stores.
Is there a big difference between regular and express trains? I don't want to accidentally get on the wrong one.
Express trains skip stations so make sure your stop isn't one that gets skipped. The station signs are color-coded which helps a lot.
